info.title: dataminer-package-deploy
info.description: Deploys a package to DataMiner from the catalog or directly from an artifact.

commands.name: from-artifact
commands.description: Deploys a specific package from a local application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol) to a DataMiner Agent. Warning: if using legacy application packages (.dmapp that you unzip, contains an Update.zip) the remote Agent will perform a restart.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.

options.name: --path-to-artifact
options.description: Path to the application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol).

options.name: --dm-server-location
options.description: The IP address or host name of the DataMiner Agent.

options.name: --dm-user
options.description: The DataMiner user to set up a direct connection to an accessible Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_USER' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_USER_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).

options.name: --dm-password
options.description: The password to set up a direct connection to an accessible Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_PASSWORD' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).

options.name: --deploy-timeout-in-seconds
options.description: Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]

options.name: --post-action
options.description: Specify the post-action to perform. This only works for protocol packages (.dmprotocol). [default: None]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: from-catalog
commands.description: Deploys a specific package from the cloud to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.

options.name: --catalog-id
options.description: The unique catalog artifact identifier. This is the catalog GUID of the item.

options.name: --catalog-version
options.description: The version of the catalog item you want to deploy.

options.name: --agent-destination-id
options.description: The destination agent ID to deploy to. To obtain this ID for an existing DataMiner System, navigate to its details page in the Admin app. The ID is the last GUID of the URL.

options.name: --dm-catalog-token
options.description: The organization key to deploy to a specific cloud-connected DataMiner as defined in admin.dataminer.services. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).

options.name: --deploy-timeout-in-seconds
options.description: Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: from-volatile
commands.description: Deploys a specific package that was uploaded using the CatalogUpload tool without long-term registration on the Catalog (Volatile Upload) to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent. Only supports private artifacts uploaded using a key from the specific agent (System Key).

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.

options.name: --artifact-id
options.description: The unique internal artifact identifier as returned from the CatalogUpload tool when performing a Volatile Upload.

options.name: --dm-system-token
options.description: The DataMiner System key to deploy to a specific cloud-connected DataMiner agent as defined in admin.dataminer.services for a specific Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).

options.name: --deploy-timeout-in-seconds
options.description: Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
